description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. Product Details Rasasi Deserve is a perfume spray for women with a fresh aromatic fragrance. The perfume comes in a simple and elegant glass flask with simple styling Size 70 ml
